topic: Admin Dashboard Complete Redesign - Brutalist Style

changes.description: Completely rewrote admin dashboard using brutalist design matching homepage (Inter font, black borders, brutal shadows, light bg, colored accent cards). Removed all MUI dependencies from admin.
Extracted admin API into standalone module (adminBrutalApi.js). Fixed N+1 nickname query with batch .in() fetch. Reduced codebase from 1685 lines to 379+84+192=655 lines total.
Security tab: password change form with validation, active session display, security recommendations list.
Settings tab: site configuration form (name, limits, energy cost), quick links to all test pages, Supabase console link for data management.
Records tab: type filter dropdown, pagination with page controls, total count display. Dashboard: stat cards with today counts, type distribution grid, recent records table.

validation.syntaxCheck: All 3 files pass balanced braces/parens/brackets check
validation.browserVerification: All 4 tabs verified via browser: Login (brutalist card), Dashboard (stats + type grid + recent records), Records (filter + pagination showing 7114 total), Security (password form + session info), Settings (config form + quick links)

knownLimitations: Password change is frontend-only demo - needs backend support
Settings config saves to localStorage only - needs backend sync
Admin credentials still hardcoded in adminBrutalApi.js - needs Supabase Auth migration
